title: Breaking into Impel Down: Rising Conflict
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: At Shabondy archipelago....!! I should have known....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You can't trust what a shichibukai says...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The ground is like a frying pan!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: What a place I've come to ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UWAH!! A grilled bird fell down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They barely even have shadows left...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: This is level 3, the starvation hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We need to get out of here...

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: rising conflict.
